document_name: Current Danish EPA/DFVA Positive List of Approved Cleaning Agents for Food-Contact Plastic Reuse
description: Official list of chemicals certified for cleaning HDPE packaging intended for reuse in contact with food, essential for ensuring regulatory compliance and validating the reuse pipeline (Risk 7).
steps_to_find: Search the official Danish Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) or Veterinary and Food Administration (DFVA) online portals for certified substance lists.
Directly contact EPA technical review board for confirmation on specific HDPE standards.

document_name: Historical Arla Crate Loss Rate Data and Current Inventory Management System Specifications
description: Internal data quantifying the annual loss volume (270,000 units baseline) and documentation detailing the import/export procedures and data structure of the Arla Procurement ERP system, needed for designing the 'Ready-to-Deploy Stock Report' integration.
steps_to_find: Submit formal data request to Arla Internal Statistics/Finance department.
Liaise with IT/Systems team to obtain documentation on the Procurement forecasting module interface.

document_name: Comparative Danish Consumer Effort Cost Data for Small-Value Returns
description: Existing research or internal Arla data quantifying the average perceived effort or travel cost Danish consumers associate with small, municipal or non-grocery-related return/recycling tasks, used to validate the DKK 5 incentive effectiveness.
steps_to_find: Search relevant Danish university economics/psychology departments for relevant studies.
Inquire with internal Arla market research teams for any legacy consumer effort studies.

document_name: Baseline Danish Life Cycle Assessment (LCA) Methodology for HDPE Plastic Production
description: The official, published methodology used by the industry or Danish EPA to calculate the default CO2 emissions baseline associated with manufacturing a new HDPE milk crate, which is necessary to robustly quantify the 106-tonne projected savings.
steps_to_find: Consult publicly available LCA databases or reports from the European Food and Beverage association regarding primary plastic packaging.
Contact Circular Economy Consultant for recognized LCA boundary-setting documents in the region.

document_name: Ørsted Case Studies: Danish Municipal Stakeholder Coordination Strategy
description: Documentation detailing Ørsted's organizational structure, relationship management protocols, and specific mitigation strategies used to ensure standardized compliance across local Danish municipal authorities for large public engagement campaigns.
steps_to_find: Search Ørsted public relations/sustainability reports for 'Municipal Coordination' or 'Stakeholder Engagement'.
Search for Danish PR agency case studies detailing collaboration with Ørsted on national CSR initiatives.

document_name: Danish Consumer Perception of Small Financial vs. Tangible Nudges (Academic/NGO Report)
description: Academic or NGO-published data analyzing the efficacy of fixed small monetary donations (e.g., 5 DKK) versus equivalent tangible equivalents (e.g., 'one meal') as motivations for consumer participation in Danish CSR activities.
steps_to_find: Search Danish university research repositories focusing on behavioral economics or consumer psychology.
Review reports published by large consumer advocacy groups or the Arla Foundation's own prior evaluations.
